shop.products.wildflower.title: Wildflower Honey
shop.products.wildflower.description: A delicate blend of nectars from our meadow wildflowers. Perfect for everyday use.

shop.products.wildflower_large.descripti: Our signature wildflower honey in a larger jar. Great value for honey lovers.

shop.products.linden.description: Aromatic linden honey from our family apiaries. Mild flavor and exceptional aroma.

shop.products.manuka.description: Rare, therapeutic-grade Manuka honey. Limited availability.
